company.name: Ceili Mor Academy of Dance
company.venue: Kalaivanar Auditorium, Chennai Arts Festival main stage

musician.name: Colm Fitzgerald
musician.note: travels from Pondicherry for special movements

movement.name: Earth
movement.intent: The floor reads as ground, not as display. Stillness before any sound.
movement.formationCue: Tight knot upstage, break to a diagonal on the second phrase.

movement.name: Water
movement.intent: The contemporary spill takes the arms while the feet keep the light Munster lift.
movement.musicCue: Fiddle leads, bodhran drops to a heartbeat, voice hums without words.
movement.formationCue: Three dancers, then five, then the full eight, entering like a tide.
movement.loadNote: Keep Emma off the deep landings until the orthopaedic review clears the season.

movement.name: Fire
movement.intent: The most demanding writing in the piece. Solo into trio into full ensemble.
movement.musicCue: Fiddle and bodhran trade the drive, voice silent.
movement.costumeNote: Lighter Fire fabric, the previous cloth drags on the fast trebles.
movement.loadNote: Build stamina across the autumn, hold the speed until November.

movement.name: Air
movement.intent: Voice forward, dancers light and barely earthed, lift over footwork.
movement.musicCue: Aoife carries an old air, words at last.
movement.projectionCue: Moving light language shared with the Metro commission. It supports, it does not lead.

movement.name: Ether
movement.intent: All four elements gathered and let go. The opening knot returns, now breathing.
movement.closing: End on the eight counts of stillness that opened the work. The last image is the empty floor.

openItems.item: Confirm Colm travel from Pondicherry for the dress rehearsals.
Lock projection cues once the Metro install is built, reuse where it serves.
Margaret to see a full run on the Thursday call before tech.
